title: Compassion
prompt: A teaching emphasizes love for others, forgiveness, and compassion as a path to peace. Which tradition is this most associated with?

title: Submission
prompt: A core idea centers around submission to the will of God and living a disciplined life guided by divine law. Which tradition is this?
reflection: What role does discipline play in belief systems?

title: Enlightenment
prompt: A path focused on ending suffering through understanding, mindfulness, and enlightenment. Which tradition is this?
reflection: Can inner peace affect outer coexistence?

title: Covenant
prompt: A belief centered on a sacred agreement between a people and God, guided by laws and traditions. Which tradition is this?
reflection: How do shared laws shape communities?

title: Balance
prompt: A philosophy emphasizing harmony with the natural flow of the universe and balance between opposing forces. Which philosophy is this?
reflection: What happens when balance is lost?
